brand_profile.writing_instruction: This brand observes strong contrast between dark and light colors (e.g. #1a0f13) to convey technical information, consistent font sizes for headings (e.g. H1: 48px), and detailed typography (e.g. monospace font). Match the tone with formal language, precise definitions, and concise explanations to match this brand's voice, emphasizing data-driven insights and technical capabilities.

product_knowledge.description: Searchable is a SaaS product described on the source page. It helps teams improve execution speed, reduce operational friction, and align cross-functional work through clearer workflows and automation. features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure content is cited and linked by AI engines
pain_points: Spending hours analyzing AI visibility gaps
Lack of actionable insights to improve AI search rankings
messaging_angles: Unlock the full potential of AI search optimization
Take control of your brand's visibility across multiple AI engines
product_knowledge.target_customer: e-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, agencies

content_brief.benchmark_reference: Gartner Report: AI Search Optimization Trends
content_brief.reasoning: With our Searchable product, you can unlock the full potential of AI search optimization and take control of your brand's visibility across multiple AI engines. Our proof points show that 2 out of 4 features have driven significant improvements in user experience, while our technical tone resonates with customers looking for actionable insights.

strategy_brief.differentiator: Unlock hidden AI visibility gaps and optimize search rankings with data-driven insights
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Discover how Searchable can transform your team's workflow efficiency
strategy_brief.messaging_angle_used: Unlock the full potential of AI search optimization
